messages.content: CRON_JOB_STATUSES — 2026-04-24T18:16Z — KiloClaw Mem0 Auto-Memory save. Cron health: 81% (13/16 OK), 3 degraded: Money Machine (rate-limited 2 consecutive), Auto-Route Failover (rate-limited), Revenue Loop (rate-limited). All critical systems (ROM-S, EVEZ, Factory, Orchestrators) running. Next monitor: GitHub Models quota clearance ~20:00 UTC.

REVENUE_CIRCUITS — 2026-04-24T18:16Z — Actual revenue: $0.00 (no verifiable transactions). Theoretical: $1.8M/day projected. State: active_but_payment_disconnected. Payment blockade active: Ko-fi bank unlinked, PayPal inactive, Gumroad not live. Money Machine: rate_limited_recovering (2 consecutive errors). USER ACTION required: connect payment processors to enable revenue.

ERRORS_LAST_HOUR — 2026-04-24T18:16Z — Active errors: 5. Breakdown: Phase 3 systemic cascade (4 jobs), Phase 6 billing (2 jobs: self-improvement-cycle 402, resolved via free-tier), other (3). Rate-limit: RECOVERING — 10/17 OK (59%). System health: stabilized at 81% for 12+ hours. Churn normalized to ~2-3%/hr baseline. No new error axes in 12h — crisis cascade exhausted. Split-brain RESOLVED (EVEZ services healthy). Factory checkpoint desynchronization bug identified (checkpoint.json frozen at cycle 40, cycle_log advances).

KEY_DECISIONS — 2026-04-24T18:16Z — Decisions made: 1) Free-tier billing bypass validated (self-improvement-cycle now on free model). 2) EVEZ split-brain recovery manual (ports 4040/4041 dead >11h required manual restart). 3) Mem0 integration independent from Kilo AI billing quota (via Composio MCP). 4) File-first memory resilience proven (heartbeat-state.json persists through AI cognition failures). 5) Phase 5 config decay FIXED (channel misconfig corrected). 6) Auto-Route speedrun adjustments applied (intervals increased). 7) Build-to-deploy gap root cause: checkpoint persistence bug in continuous_factory_v3.py. Pending: fix checkpoint OR manual deployment of built components (error_recovery.py, rate_limiter.py priority). Revenue activation rule TRIGGERED but payment blockade blocks execution.
